summary.default: Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience in backend development, technical support, and web systems. Currently completing a BSc Honours in Security and Network Engineering. I build reliable systems, debug production issues, and ship clean code. Open to backend, cloud, support, and security-focused roles.
summary.backend: Backend developer with experience building APIs, web systems, and automation tools. Comfortable with Python, C#, Java, Node.js, and SQL databases. I focus on reliability, clean code, and practical solutions that work in production.
summary.support: Technically strong support professional with L2/L3 experience resolving real production issues. Background in backend development gives me the ability to go deeper than surface-level fixes. Fast learner, clear communicator, calm under pressure.
summary.cloud: Cloud-curious backend developer with Azure exposure and a Security and Network Engineering Honours degree in progress. I understand infrastructure, deployment, and system reliability from both a development and operational angle.
summary.security: Security and Network Engineering Honours student with a Computer Science foundation and practical backend experience. Familiar with secure coding practices, network fundamentals, and system administration via PowerShell and Azure.

experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Maintain and improve a live production website supporting daily business operations
Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues across the stack
Implement feature updates and performance improvements
Manage deployments and ensure site stability

projects.name: Password Generator
projects.description: Cryptographically secure password generator built entirely in the browser using the Web Cryptography API. Includes strength scoring via entropy calculation, configurable character sets, and a clean UI.

projects.name: GitHub Stats Dashboard
projects.description: Live dashboard that fetches any GitHub user's public data via the GitHub REST API and displays repos, languages, stars, forks, and follower stats in a clean interface.

projects.name: URL Link Shortener
projects.description: A service that maps long URLs to short codes, handles redirects, and tracks basic analytics. Built with a backend API and persistent storage.

projects.name: Simple Chat System
projects.description: Backend for a customer-to-business chat system embedded in a website. Focused on message persistence, delivery, and integration with a live site.

projects.name: CV Automation Pipeline
projects.description: Automated backend system that generates tailored CVs and cover letters from job descriptions using Claude API, FastAPI, and dynamic document formatting.

projects.name: AI-Powered Fleet Maintenance & Fuel Optimization System
projects.description: Built a smart fleet platform that predicts vehicle maintenance needs and detects fuel inefficiencies using telematics data and lightweight AI. Enables small-mid fleet operators to reduce downtime, cut fuel costs, and automate service workflows through real-time dashboards, predictive alerts, and work order management.

projects.name: Finance Dashboard
projects.description: Built a dark-themed finance dashboard with real-time data visualization using Chart.js. Features income/expense tracking, budget forecasting, and interactive charts powered by a Node.js/PostgreSQL backend. Designed with a cyber purple aesthetic for a modern, recruiter-ready UI.

projects.name: Weather App
projects.description: Built a weather application that provides real time weather forecasts based on user location or searched cities. Integrated external weather APIs to display current conditions, temperature, humidity, and multi day forecasts.

projects.name: Sewandgrow Website
projects.description: Maintained and improved a live production website for a Johannesburg-based business. Handled updates, bug fixes, and performance improvements.

traits: Adaptable across backend, support, and cloud roles
Fast learner in new environments and tech stacks
